future.notificationsBody: Central notification templates will reuse these keys.

landing.eyebrow: Smart platform for modern equestrian and stable management.
landing.heroTitle: EquiCore brings training, horse health, inventory, and financial operations together in one connected platform designed for modern equestrian businesses.
landing.heroLead: Built with a secure multi-tenant architecture, every stable operates within its own isolated environment with complete data separation.
landing.cardApprovalBody: Every stable registration is reviewed and approved by the Super Admin before dashboard access is activated.
landing.cardScopedBody: All horses, riders, reports, and operational records are linked to a stableId to ensure privacy, organization, and enterprise-grade separation.
landing.cardMobileBody: EquiCore is designed to support future mobile applications, smart devices, and external integrations.
landing.cardLuxuryBody: A premium interface inspired by modern equestrian sport and built to global SaaS standards.
landing.whyIntroBody: A premium interface inspired by modern equestrian sport and built to global SaaS standards.
landing.whyLead:
A complete operational platform designed for:

• Endurance
• Show Jumping
• Flat Racing
• Multi-discipline equestrian facilities
landing.featureGovBody:
Professional registration and approval workflows inspired by federation-level operations:

• Pending Review
• Approved
• Rejected
landing.featureRolesBody:
Stable managers can create and manage:

• Trainers
• Veterinarians
• Riders
• Finance staff
• Operational staff

—with a structured and secure permission system for every role.
landing.featureIntelBody: Monitor training, horse welfare, expenses, and operational KPIs in one place to improve performance and maintain horse wellbeing.
landing.moduleOpsBody: Manage horses, riders, daily activities, and training schedules.
landing.moduleCareBody: Track injuries, treatments, vaccinations, medications, and veterinary records.
landing.moduleCommercialBody: Manage inventory, suppliers, expenses, subscriptions, and operational costs.
landing.moduleIntelBody: Generate operational and financial reports with export-ready reporting tools.
landing.ctaLead: Register your stable once and let EquiCore handle approvals, users, and daily operations through one unified platform.

login.title: Sign in to EquiCore
login.lead: Enter your credentials. This build uses local demo accounts only — swap in API authentication when your backend is ready.
login.stableUserHint: Invited member demo (stable-1): opens your first allowed workspace (e.g. schedule), not the admin dashboard; sidebar follows a Trainer permission preset.
login.footnote: Demo accounts: admin / stable / trainer / doctor / accountant (password matches username).

register.leadBefore: Tell us about your facility. Registrations begin in

register.documentHint: Uploads will connect to secure storage when the API is ready.

pending.title: Awaiting Super Admin approval
pending.leadAfter: status. EquiCore locks dashboards until a Super Admin validates your facility profile and commercial details.
pending.li1: Our team reviews stable type, headcount, and jurisdiction.
pending.li2: You will receive an email once the tenant is approved or rejected.
pending.li3: After approval, your stableId becomes the anchor for every record.

stableUsers.title: Users & roles
stableUsers.subtitle: Invited members receive one official role as a permission preset. Final access is always per-user. Demo tenant <0>{{id}}</0>.
stableUsers.roleTemplateHelper: Roles are templates only. Final access depends on the permissions selected for this user.
stableUsers.rolePresetAppliedMessage: Role applied as a permission preset. You can customize this user's permissions below.
stableUsers.roleDescStableOwner: Full access to all pages and full CRUD on all features. Cannot be reassigned from this form.
stableUsers.roleDescStableAdmin: Manages daily stable operations: horses, riders, training, inventory, expenses, and reports depending on permissions. Cannot change ownership, delete the stable account, or control subscription unless explicitly allowed.
stableUsers.roleDescTrainer: Manages training schedules and plans, assigns horses and riders, updates training results, and can complete post-training health checks when permitted.
stableUsers.roleDescRider: Views assigned training sessions and horses, submits rider feedback, and can update training completion notes when permitted. Limited access by default.
stableUsers.roleDescVeterinarian: Manages health records, exams, blood tests, vaccinations, medication courses, and the medical calendar; can review medical alerts.
stableUsers.roleDescAccountant: Manages expenses, views billing and payment records, generates financial reports, and tracks deferred payments. Limited access to non-financial modules unless allowed.
stableUsers.roleDescStaff: Handles operational tasks: inventory updates, horse care notes, and basic task updates. Limited access by default.
stableUsers.photoHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF — up to 2 MB. Stored in this browser session only (demo).
stableUsers.toastPhotoTooLarge: Image is too large (max 2 MB for demo).
stableUsers.permPanelSubtitle: Fine-grained access for {{name}} — roles are templates only.
stableUsers.permFeaturesHint: Turn on page access to configure feature-level CRUD below.

dashboard.noMovementData: Record stock movements to see volume trends.

medication.safetyNotice: Medication stock and administration records must be reviewed by a licensed veterinarian. EquiCore does not recommend dosage or treatment decisions.

toast.supplyRequired: Item name and quantity are required

stableSettings.pageSubtitle: Manage stable profile, platform access, users, security, notifications, billing, integrations, and operational preferences.

profile.title: Stable Profile
profile.lead: Update your stable identity, contact details, capacity, and branding. Changes are stored locally until the API is connected.

access.title: Platform Access Control
access.lead: Control whether users under this stable can sign in. When suspended, all stable users are blocked at login (future backend rule).

users.title: Users & Roles
users.lead: Overview of stable membership and shortcuts to user administration (placeholders).

notifications.lead: Choose channels and alert types for operational reminders across the platform.

integrations.lead: Connect third-party services and reporting tools scoped to this stable.

data.title: Data & Backup

operations.title: Operational Preferences
